name: brca_omics_deep
notes: Baseline improvement 4/5: hidden_dims=[256, 128, 32] adds a wider first hidden layer and one additional depth level compared to the baseline [128, 32]. The extra capacity allows the model to learn more complex gene-gene interaction patterns before compressing to the risk scalar. Batch normalisation and dropout (both kept at default) should prevent the additional parameters from overfitting on the ~900-patient cohort. All other settings identical to brca_omics_topk1000 (CI=0.6017).
